name: LazarBeam
oneLine: Australian gaming YouTuber known for comedic Fortnite and Minecraft commentary and meme-driven editing.
bio: Lannan Eacott started his channel in 2015 making slow-motion demolition videos before pivoting to game commentary. Fortnite Battle Royale uploads in 2018 and Minecraft in 2019 drove explosive growth, hitting 10 million subscribers in April 2019 and 20 million by May 2022. In 2020 he signed an exclusive YouTube streaming deal alongside Muselk, and in 2021 received his own Fortnite Icon Series outfit.
